title: OpenJLPT Kanji Entry
description: A single JLPT kanji at a given level, enriched from KANJIDIC2.

character.description: The kanji character (maxLength 2 allows for surrogate-pair code points).

level.description: JLPT level (current N5–N1 system, derived from Waller's lists).

grade.description: Japanese school grade / jōyō classification (from KANJIDIC2).

freq.description: Frequency rank in newspapers, 1 = most frequent (from KANJIDIC2).

meanings.description: English meanings (from KANJIDIC2, falling back to Waller).
